name: Slow Cooker Lamb Shanks with Split Peas
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4 to 6
1. Completely soften peas by your favorite method.
2. Brown the lamb shanks under broil until browned; drain well.
3. Mix all ingredients except shanks in a Crock-Pot.
4. Stir well.
5. Add shanks, pushing down into liquid.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 10 to 12 hours.
